connectionString.description: Full Azure Blob Storage connection string. Overrides accountName if provided.

prefix.description: Key prefix for all cache entries.

encryptionKey.description: Client-side AES-256-CBC encryption key. Encrypts artifacts before upload.

encryptionScope.description: Azure encryption scope name. When set, blobs are written under this scope so Azure encrypts them at rest with the scope's key (typically a customer-managed key in Key Vault). Reads are transparent.
